english translation text: Crushed under the hooves of horses, Oh trampled body of Qasim (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Marne Ke Liye Tu Ne Jab Izn Nahi Paaya
english translation text: When you did not receive permission to die

urdu transliteration text: Khidmat May Shah E Deen Ki Khat Baap Ka Pohnchaya
english translation text: You brought the letter of your father (Imam Hassan) to Imam Hussain (AS)

urdu transliteration text:
Phir Ashk-E-Musalsal Thay Aur Shah Ka Chehra Tha (x2)
Then Imam Hussain (AS) cried profusely
Yaad Aagaye Kuch Payma Ay Chaak Badan Qasim
english translation text: He remembered his brother, Oh trampled body of Qasim (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Pamaal Sumay Aspa Ay Chaak Badan Qasim
english translation text: Crushed under the hooves of horses, Oh trampled body of Qasim (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Maidaan Se Jaise Hi Awaaz Teri Aayi
english translation text: As soon as you cried out from the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Faujo Ki Taraf Jhapttay Abbas Bhi Sarwar Bhi
Hazrat Abbas and Imam Hussain (AS) attacked the enemies bravely
Bhagdar Jo Machi Ran May Har Samt Qayamat Thi (x2)
english translation text: There was chaos all around, as if the day of Judgement had arrived

urdu transliteration text: Phir Ruk Na Saka Toofan Ay Chaak Badan Qasim
english translation text: Then the storm couldn’t stop, Oh trampled body of Qasim (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Pamaal Sumay Aspa Ay Chaak Badan Qasim
english translation text: Crushed under the hooves of horses, Oh trampled body of Qasim (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Khaimo May Qayamat Hai Kubra Pay Falak Toota
english translation text: There is mayhem in the tents, as though the sky has fallen on earth

urdu transliteration text: Ronay Ki Sadaayen Hai Maadar Ko Hua Sadma
english translation text: Everyone is crying and your mother (Umme Farwa) is in deep shock

urdu transliteration text:
No Shah Ko Chaadar May Laatay Hai Shah-E-Waala (x2)
When Imam Hussain (AS) brings Hazrat Qasim’s body pieces to the tent
Ab Hogaya Ghar Veeran Ay Chaak Badan Qasim
english translation text: Now the house has become deserted, Oh trampled body of Qasim (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Pamaal Sumay Aspa Ay Chaak Badan Qasim
english translation text: Crushed under the hooves of horses, Oh trampled body of Qasim (AS)

urdu transliteration text: Sandal Hai Na Gehnay Hai Ubtan Hai Na Mehndi Hai
english translation text: There is no Jewellery, nor any Mehndi…

urdu transliteration text: Is Tarha Ki Shaadi Bhi Logo Kahin Hoti Hai
english translation text: Have you ever witnessed a wedding of this type?

urdu transliteration text: Maqtal May Hain Baarati Har Samt Udasi Hai (x2)
english translation text: The groom is in the battlefield and there is grief all around

urdu transliteration text: Aur Khaak Basar Hai Maa Ay Chaak Badan Qasim
english translation text: And the mother (Umme Farwa) is on the ground, Oh trampled body of Qasim (AS)
